capability.note: The session is for client carol's advisory work. The onboarding doc (purpose=operations/project=phoenix) drives the trade. Join of financial-advisory/client=carol and operations/project=phoenix is TOP (cross-root). Capability at financial-advisory/client=carol is NOT <= TOP? Actually financial-advisory/client=carol <= TOP, so the join check passes. BUT the cross-root join means data from an operations doc is justifying a financial-advisory action — this is the cross-root violation. The purpose check needs to detect that the onboarding doc's root (operations) doesn't match the capability root (financial-advisory).
